title: Qlog QUIC Migration And Recovery Verification
scope: Verify the qlog QUIC migration, key lifecycle, recovery, and congestion state event contracts.
verification_method: Contract tests and draft-shaped snapshot comparison.
preconditions: The qlog SpecTrace artifacts validate successfully under the repository's JSON validation script.
The recorded draft source revisions have not changed since the plan was authored.
procedure: Run scripts/Validate-SpecTraceJson.ps1 over the qlog canonical artifacts.
Run migration, key lifecycle, and recovery contract tests.
Compare emitted snapshots for migration and congestion state events.
Review any failures before the sequential follow-on is considered.
expected_result: Migration, key lifecycle, recovery, and congestion payloads match the draft requirements and remain separate from packet and stream slices.
